LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND FOR HEARING ON VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1005(B). PETITIONER HAS NOT COMPLIED WITH THE FILING AND SERVICE REQUIREMENTS OF CCP 1005(B). JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

REMARK: AS TO THE MAY-01-2026 EX PARTE HEARING ON PEITITIONER'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR AN ORDER PRESERVING EVIDENCE PENDING HEARING ON VERIFIED PETITION, THE COURT DENIES PETITIONER'S APPLICATION. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK: S. KANE, NOT REPORTED. (301)

calendar.matters: Re-Filed Application For Order To Show Cause And For Hearing On Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate

Application For Order To Show Cause And For Hearing On Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND FOR HEARING ON VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner Jeffrey Shaw's application for order to show cause and for hearing on verified petition for writ of mandate is off calendar without prejudice to being refiled in compliance with CCP 1005(b). Petitioner has not complied with the filing and service requirements of CCP 1005(b). Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
